contract_claim: Document describes the disconnect() method under IDebugAdapter Lifecycle as 'Disconnect from the debug adapter (closes the DAP connection but does not fully tear down the adapter)' but does not mention it also appears under Connection management. The interface actually only has disconnect() once - under Connection (L196). The Lifecycle section in the interface only has initialize() and dispose().
observed_behavior: **Lifecycle (required):** `initialize(): Promise<void>` (L33) — set up adapter, validate environment; `dispose(): Promise<void>` (L38) — tear down resources
